No sanitize_text_field, no preg_replace stripping \r\n, no filter_var, no str_replace anywhere. The sink is real and the chain is clean. The claimed reachability and auth requirement are accurate. Medium severity is correct: real code defect, real injection path on older PHP, but requires attacker control of the HTTPS API response body.
